title: Alan Turing Institute
body: The Alan Turing Institute is the United Kingdom's national institute for data science and artificial intelligence, founded in 2015 and largely funded by the UK Government. It is named after Alan Turing, the British mathematician and computing pioneer. Since 2025, the institute focuses on defense and national security, following demands by the UK Government.
